overview: Heartland Farms — a modern, premium marketing website for an agriculture brand in Vijayapura, North Karnataka. Built around the founder's powerful transformation story from Siemens engineer to full-time farmer. Features a rich hero, founder story, farming practices, product showcase, gallery, blog, and WhatsApp-enabled contact — designed for emotional connection and future e-commerce readiness.
features: Hero with YouTube video placeholder and CTAs
Founder transformation story — corporate to farming
Farming practices: integrated model, sustainability, crop diversity, vineyards
Products showcase with 'Online Ordering Coming Soon'
Gallery with lightbox for farm, vineyard, lifestyle, and journey photos
Blog foundation with 4 sample posts for SEO and branding
Contact with WhatsApp button, form, map, and social links
Mobile-first, earthy premium design in deep green, soil brown, and light cream
SEO-optimized semantic HTML with keywords for organic and sustainable farming
